requestBody.description: Detection request with image URL and exemplar boxes.

get.summary:
Checks whether the AI detection service (GECO2 HuggingFace Space) is currently available.
Useful for showing service status in the UI before the user attempts detection.

assignmentId.description: The assignment ID the detection belongs to, used for authorization checks.

imageUrl.description:
Optional image URL sent by the client.
When provided, it must match the assignment image stored by the backend.

exemplars.description: 1-3 exemplar bounding boxes drawn by the user to indicate what objects to find.

threshold.description:
Detection confidence threshold (0.05 to 0.95). Lower = more detections.
Default: 0.33

enableMask.description:
Whether to return segmentation masks along with bounding boxes.
Default: false (faster).

xmin.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner (pixels).

ymin.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner (pixels).

xmax.description: X coordinate of the bottom-right corner (pixels).

ymax.description: Y coordinate of the bottom-right corner (pixels).

ExemplarBox.description:
A bounding box drawn by the user as exemplar reference for few-shot detection.
Coordinates are in pixels relative to the original image dimensions.

Bearer.description: Enter your token below (do not type 'Bearer ').
